title: Let's do a jumpscare
description: The darkness lingers in the inventory!
body:
![logo](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/IBWZnRBJ/images/20bafe77763064ed104d0754daf686530d3575e7.png)
The darkness lingers in the inventory Has a random chance of jumpscaring you in caves when opening your inventory. This mod participated in the DeModContest of 2023. (demodcontest.com(unavailable)) Requires Fabric API & OwO Lib for advanced configuration. If you have more jumpscares let me know on this mods Issue Page on Github.
By Charlsen
